title: BlackBelt - Academy Management
subtitle: Complete martial arts platform
description:
BlackBelt is the most complete platform for martial arts academy management. Manage students, classes, belt rankings, finances, QR code check-in, and much more.

Features:
- Smart dashboard with real-time metrics
- QR Code check-in with geofencing
- Class and belt ranking management
- Complete financial control
- Direct communication with students
- Progress tracking
- Achievement and gamification system
- Kids mode with adapted interface
- Teen profile with guided autonomy
- Parents area
- Videos and educational content
- Integrated store
- Support for BJJ, Judo, Karate, Muay Thai and more

For academy owners, instructors, students, and parents.
whatsnew:
v1.0.0 - Official Launch
- QR Code and biometric check-in
- Complete admin dashboard
- Belt progression tracking
- Gamified Kids mode (ages 4-11)
- Teen profile with guided autonomy (ages 12-17)
- Real-time push notifications
- Offline mode with automatic sync
- Integrated store
- Support for BJJ, Judo, Karate, Muay Thai and more
